commands.review_summary:
The PR changes OpenAI TTS voice compatibility to use the shared media helper for response formats and adds provider and speech-core tests for MP3 voice-note routing.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection. Current main keeps configured OpenAI mp3 responseFormat but reports voiceCompatible only for opus, and speech-core then leaves Telegram audioAsVoice unset for that voice-note path.
commands.review_followup: Contributor-supplied real behavior proof is required before merge; there is no narrow code repair for ClawSweeper to make on the PR branch.
